title: Tangy Zesty Russian Cheese Wrap
description: A festive dish featuring monterey jack cheese, katsuramuki-cut, served in a low-calorie pandan-leaf wrap. Perfect for a weeknight dinner or lunch on-the-go.
instructions: Wrap a pandan leaf around a quarter cup of thinly sliced red onion and a tablespoon of crumbled monterey jack cheese.
Mix the crumbled cheese with 1 teaspoon of crushed garlic, 1 tablespoon of chopped fresh dill, and 1 teaspoon of chopped fresh parsley in a bowl.
Add 2 tablespoons of crème fraîche and 1 teaspoon of lemon juice to the bowl and mix well.
Sprinkle salt and black pepper to taste.
Add the mixture to the pandan leaf wrap and brush with a small amount of unsalted butter.
Garnish with chopped walnut halves and serve immediately.
Serve the Tangy Zesty Russian Cheese Wrap cold, garnished with additional chopped fresh herbs if desired.
Cut the pandan leaf wrap into bite-sized pieces for an easy snack or appetizer.
Repeat with the remaining ingredients to make additional wraps.
Refrigerate the finished wraps for up to 24 hours before serving.
Freeze the wraps for up to 3 months and thaw at room temperature before serving.
